data.description:
## Context

Placeholder epic for R-4 from the DSO gap analysis (~/dso_rebar_plan_review_gap_report.md, R-4), REFRAMED during design review from 'cite bug history in rubrics' into a first-class, extensible mechanism.

DSO anchors its reviewer prompts with concrete worked examples from its own bug history (e.g. the --label vs --labels flag-mismatch defect; a false-positive from a 20-ticket calibration record). Concrete failures calibrate an LLM reviewer far better than abstract instructions. rebar has a BETTER source than DSO for this: the REVIEW_RESULT sidecar accumulates real per-criterion findings and false-positive signal.

## The concept (converged reframe)
A CALIBRATION-EXAMPLE LIBRARY for plan review:
- A CORE set of examples ships with rebar (per criterion: a sharp good/bad worked example).
- Projects can add their OWN project-specific examples -- mirroring the existing extension seam (.rebar/criteria_routing.json overlay + .rebar/prompts/ overrides). An absent overlay fails open to the core set.
- This makes rebar LEARN OVER TIME: it increases its effectiveness based on accumulated experience in a SPECIFIC project (a false positive seen once becomes a calibration anchor that prevents its recurrence).

This is the natural evolution of R-4 + the sidecar's per-criterion FP record + the existing project-overlay architecture.

## Open design questions (for the brainstorm session)
- [ ] WHERE in the four-pass pipeline is example context injected? (Pass-1 finder rubrics? Pass-2 verifier? both? Injecting into the verifier risks anchoring the FP-filter; injecting into the finder shapes what gets surfaced. Decide deliberately.)
- [ ] HOW are examples CURATED to prevent unbounded growth? (A per-criterion cap? Relevance/recency scoring? Dedup by norm_id? Promotion from sidecar -> curated library needs a gate so the prompt doesn't bloat and bust the cache.)
- [ ] Sourcing: hand-authored core vs auto-mined from sidecar corpus vs human-curated promotion of sidecar findings.
- [ ] Interaction with the CI prompt/routing drift-parity gate and prompt-cache efficiency (examples are prompt weight).
- [ ] Format/contract: how examples attach to a criterion (prompt front-matter? a sibling examples file keyed by criterion id?).

## Success Criteria
- [ ] A decision on injection point(s) in the plan-review pipeline
- [ ] A curation mechanism with a bounded-growth guarantee
- [ ] A core example set + a project-extension seam consistent with the existing overlay architecture
- [ ] A promotion path from observed sidecar findings/FPs into curated examples

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] This epic holds the reframed concept + open design questions from the review discussion
- [ ] Sequenced AFTER the G-series rubric enrichments (no point anchoring rubrics about to be rewritten)
- [ ] Placeholder only pending a dedicated brainstorming session
data.title: Plan-review calibration-example library (core + project-extensible, learns over time) (R-4)
